title: Bardiel and unit 3
wikitext:
[]: Bardiel and unit-3             Quote Post by evafanatic » Sat Mar 05, 2011 4:38 am I was rewatching episode 18 and I never actually contemplated on how Bardiel and unit-3 co-existed with one another in the first place. Was unit 3 infected(and how?) by the angel or did it co-exist with each other since the unit was created?

[]: Re: Bardiel and unit-3             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Mar 05, 2011 5:05 am evafanatic wrote: Was unit 3 infected(and how?) by the angel

[]:             Quote Post by evafanatic » Sat Mar 05, 2011 4:46 pm Yea, I rewatched the episode again this morning but still can't really comprehend how the angel took the form of a cloud and infect unit 03. And what the hell was the angel doing all the way in the USA? I thought all the angels would descend upon tokyo-3(in search of lilith?).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 05, 2011 4:54 pm This is a pretty detailed topic on the Bardiel / Eva-03 thing that's probably worth skimming through. Looks like it takes a few pages to get into gear. EDIT: Actually, most of the topic is a retarded circular debate with AlaskaSlim. You may want to start here accordingly.
